parameters.formDescription: Upload two reference images and enter a prompt to generate a new image. The reference images will NOT be warped or modified in any way.

values.placeholder: e.g. Combine these two product images into a lifestyle photo on a wooden desk

parameters.content:
## Nano Banana Pro – Image Generation

**How it works:**
1. Fill out the form: enter a prompt and upload two reference images
2. The workflow calls the Gemini API (`gemini-3-pro-image-preview`) with both images + prompt
3. The generated image is returned in the response

**Setup:**
- Set `GEMINI_API_KEY` as an n8n environment variable, OR replace `{{ $env.GEMINI_API_KEY }}` in the HTTP Request node URL with your actual key

**The two input images are NEVER warped or modified — they are passed directly as reference context.**

json.Image Prompt:
Create a high-quality, professional ‘Canva-style’ Instagram post (square 1080×1080 px) that uses the provided photo as the hero image and the provided company logo as the brand mark. Do not edit, retouch, crop, recolor, filter, or otherwise change the photo or the logo in any way.

This image is to accompany the following post: Winter days can be the perfect time to create special memories with your loved ones, including seniors. ❄️ From cozy indoor games to gentle walks in the snow, our latest blog offers 5 meaningful activities that bring families closer while keeping everyone safe and engaged. At Right at Home Winnipeg, we believe every moment counts—especially during the colder months. Enjoy simple joys together that warm the heart and brighten the season. 💙 Visit our blog to discover ideas tailored for families with senior members. Reach out to see how we can support your family’s care journey. (204) 318-5554

Read more here: https://www.rightathomecanada.com/winnipeg/blog/5-fun-winter-activities-for-families-with-senior-members

#dementiacare #alzheimerscare #seniors #familytime #RightAtHomeWinnipeg

include a short header (≤10 words) on the visual derived from that text, but keep all copy minimal so the design stays clean and airy.

Include the company name Right At Home Winnipeg, phone (204) 318-5554, and website rightathomecanada.com/winnipeg in a clear footer or badge near the logo; ensure legibility at mobile size. Use soft warm neutrals with one subtle accent, rounded sans-serif type, generous negative space, and an optional small CTA pill only if it doesn’t clutter the layout. If needed for legibility, place a low-opacity translucent panel behind text — do not change the photo’s colors.

Constraints: no extra logos or watermarks, no generated logo replacements, no long paragraphs of text, and no edits to faces or the photo.
Deliverables: 1080×1080 PNG (high quality), mobile-safe crop preview (center ±10%), and one-line alt-text suggestion.
